narrative:
Cheshire Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 571 registered voters, with 48.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
